heading: Commodity credit loans
label: 77 Commodity credit loans
notes: Amendments1976—Subsec. (b). struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 94–455
amendments: Amendments1976—Subsec. (b). struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 94–455

children.heading: Election to include loans in income
children.label: a Election to include loans in income
children.text: Amounts received as loans from the Commodity Credit Corporation shall, at the election of the taxpayer, be considered as income and shall be included in gross income for the taxable year in which received.

children.heading: Effect of election on adjustments for subsequent years
children.label: b Effect of election on adjustments for subsequent years
children.text: If a taxpayer exercises the election provided for in subsection (a) for any taxable year, then the method of computing income so adopted shall be adhered to with respect to all subsequent taxable years unless with the approval of the Secretary a change to a different method is authorized.
